'''lajovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kynuramine|kynuramine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-j-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kynuramine|kynuramine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lajovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læjeveth|læjeveth]] || [[word:læjevej|læjevej]] || [[word:læjevesh|læjevesh]] || [[word:læjeve|læjeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lajojovoth|lajojovoth]] || [[word:lajojovoj|lajojovoj]] || [[word:lajojovosh|lajojovosh]] || [[word:lajojovo|lajojovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lajovoth|lajovoth]] || [[word:lajovoj|lajovoj]] || [[word:lajovosh|lajovosh]] || [[word:lajovo|lajovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lajofvoth|lajofvoth]] || [[word:lajofvoj|lajofvoj]] || [[word:lajofvosh|lajofvosh]] || [[word:lajofvof|lajofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lajovotho|lajovotho]] || [[word:lajovojo|lajovojo]] || [[word:lajovosho|lajovosho]] || [[word:lajovoko|lajovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lajovoth|lajovoth]] || [[word:lajovoj|lajovoj]] || [[word:lajovosh|lajovosh]] || [[word:lajovo|lajovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lajovothol|lajovothol]] || [[word:lajovojol|lajovojol]] || [[word:lajovoshol|lajovoshol]] || [[word:lajovokol|lajovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lajovothotho|lajovothotho]] || [[word:lajovojojo|lajovojojo]] || [[word:lajovoshosho|lajovoshosho]] || [[word:lajovoko|lajovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lajovothon|lajovothon]] || [[word:lajovojon|lajovojon]] || [[word:lajovoshon|lajovoshon]] || [[word:lajovokon|lajovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lajovothoro|lajovothoro]] || [[word:lajovojoro|lajovojoro]] || [[word:lajovoshoro|lajovoshoro]] || [[word:lajovokoro|lajovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
